channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Filipowski scores 25, but Jazz lose to Detroit, 134-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cade Cunningham had 29 points, nine assists and four steals, and the Detroit Pistons beat the Utah Jazz 134-106 on Monday night for their 10th win in 11 games. The Jazz committed 27 turnovers end a season-long nine-gam homestand with a record of 3-6.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Duke freshman Cooper Flagg stars once more in his possible farewell at Cameron Indoor Stadium
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke was minutes away from completing a perfect record on its famed home court with a Senior Night rout of Wake Forest. That's when the buzzer sounded for freshman phenom Cooper Flagg, who checked out — possibly for the final time at Cameron Indoor Stadium.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander making 50-point games a regular occurrence for the West-leading Thunder
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's putback basket in the fourth quarter put him over 50 points and sent the Oklahoma City crowd into a frenzy. The Thunder star responded by jogging downcourt expressionless, as if it were no big deal. That’s because it has become almost routine for him.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cryer scores 22 points and No. 3 Houston beats Kansas 65-59 for 9th straight win
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — L.J. Cryer scored 22 points and No. 3 Houston won its ninth straight game with a 65-59 victory over Kansas on Monday night. Emanuel Sharp added 12 points off the bench, including two free throws that pushed Houston's lead to 63-59 with 20 seconds left.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mavs' Kyrie Irving suffers left knee sprain, shoots free throws before leaving game
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Kyrie Irving suffered a left knee sprain Monday night and shot free throws for the Mavericks — with tears rolling down his cheeks — before leaving the floor in obvious pain late in the first quarter of Dallas' 122-98 loss to the Sacramento Kings.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Officials say 'technical issue' prevented video replay of missed knockdown in Davis-Roach fight
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The New York State Athletic Commission said a “technical issue” prevented officials from seeing replay of Gervonta Davis going to a knee in the ninth round of his fight against Lamont Roach, ESPN and other outlets reported Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 51 as Thunder top Rockets 137-128 for 50th win
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 51 points and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Houston Rockets 137-128 on Monday night for their 50th win of the season. Gilgeous-Alexander reached 50 points for the fourth time this season, all in the past seven weeks.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cooper Flagg, No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 to claim at least share of ACC regular-season crown
item.description: Freshman Cooper Flagg had 28 points to help No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 on Monday night to clinch at least a share of the Atlantic Coast Conference regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: St. Francis football stars taking Lancers rugby program to new heights
item.description: St. Francis is headed to the state championship game after St. Francis running back and BYU commit Kingston Keanaaina scored two tries against No.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Jimmy Johnson retires from Fox Sports after being a face of its NFL coverage for most of 3 decades
item.description: Jimmy Johnson, the Pro Football Hall of Fame coach who won two Super Bowls and a college national championship, announced his retirement from Fox Sports on Monday after being part of its NFL coverage for most of the network's 31 years.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON and JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: San Diego FC will take steps to stop the homophobic chant that marred its inaugural home match
item.description: San Diego FC intends to take steps to discourage its fans from engaging in the homophobic chant that marred the Major League Soccer expansion club’s inaugural home match last weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: NEW YORK (WGN) — A pair of scrapbooks belonging to "Shoeless" Joe Jackson are up for bid over the next two weeks. Offered by Leland's Auctions, up for bid is a collection of Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks obtained directly from Jackson's family.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Yankees' AL Rookie of the Year Luis Gil to start season on injured list with shoulder injury
item.description: Yankees right-hander Luis Gil will start the season on the injured list because of a high-grade lat strain in his pitching shoulder that will prevent him from throwing for at least six weeks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge denies Alberto Osuna's bid for injunction as he attempts to play baseball for Tennessee
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Alberto Osuna’s bid to play baseball for defending College World Series champion Tennessee received a setback Monday when a federal judge denied his bid for a preliminary injunction.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rams coach Sean McVay didn't think QB Matthew Stafford would leave during recent contract talks
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Sean McVay says he never seriously thought his partnership with Matthew Stafford would come to an end this month after four seasons together with the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Figure skating event in Washington benefiting victims of the DC plane crash raises $1.2 million
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Organizers of a figure skating benefit event in Washington said they have already raised $1.2 million for victims of the D.C. plane crash and first responders.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How does the ‘new’ Pac-12 compare to the former version? Favorably, according to the current NET rankings
item.description: How does the collection of Pac-12 schools starting in 2026 compare to the version that existed prior to this season? The NET rankings provide context.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Serena Williams joins ownership group of Toronto Tempo, the WNBA's 1st Canadian franchise
item.description: Serena Williams is joining the ownership group of the WNBA’s first Canadian franchise, the Toronto Tempo, the team announced Monday. She will partner with Larry Tanenbaum, Chairman of Kilmer Sports Ventures for the Tempo, who will begin play in the 2026 season.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Joe Gibbs senses Cup championship chemistry brewing in Bell and team after 2nd consecutive victory
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Joe Gibbs knows quite a lot about what it takes to win a championship. As an NFL coach, he won three Super Bowls. As a NASCAR team owner, his drivers have won five Cup Series titles.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Rodgers' next destination and Myles Garrett's future headlined the buzz from the NFL combine
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Matthew Stafford chose to stay in Los Angeles. Deebo Samuel was sent to Washington. Many NFL players will be on the move when free agency begins next week and the foundation for a lot of transactions was built at the scouting combine last week.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State star Cotie McMahon flashes double middle fingers to fans during intense game
item.description: Ohio State women's basketball star Cotie McMahon flashed double middle fingers in frustration amid a loss to the Maryland Terrapins on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: First female NBA scout talks trailblazing for Women's History Month
item.description: Laflin was previuosly a cheerleader for three professional sports teams, had a recurring role in "Baywatch" and worked as a model.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's grandson plays football, chess with Dolphins stars
item.description: Tua Tagovailoa and Braxton Berrios spent a day playing football and chess with President Donald Trump's grandson last month, as seen on Ivanka Trump's Instagram.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luka scores 29 points and LeBron adds 17 in the Lakers' 2nd straight win over the Clippers, 108-102
item.description: Luka Doncic had 29 points and nine assists, LeBron James added 17 points and the Los Angeles Lakers hung on to beat the Los Angeles Clippers for the second time in three days, 108-102 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Naomi Girma is injured on her Chelsea debut after world record transfer
item.description: Naomi Girma, women’s soccer's first million-dollar player, was injured and substituted on her Chelsea debut on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New Jersey cools off Utah HC, 3-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The New Jersey Devils scored twice in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-1 at Delta Center on Saturday, ending Utah's three-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC's historic home opener draws record crowd
item.description: Fans were buzzing with excitement as San Diego FC kicked off their inaugural MLS home opener against St. Louis City SC on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Going through the NFL combine, Jack Bech inspired by brother killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Jack Bech grew up in Lafayette, Louisiana, hoping to emulate his older brother. It didn't matter he was playing football games against Tiger's friends, most of whom were five or six years older, significantly bigger and more polished players than he was.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: John Collins leads Jazz to 117-116 win over Minnesota
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Walker Kessler had a go-ahead dunk with 9.7 seconds left to help the Utah Jazz beat the Minnesota Timberwolves 117-116 on Friday night, snapping a six-game losing streak in the series.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Coby White scores 24 points and Chicago Bulls top Raptors in overtime, 125-115
item.description: Coby White scored 24 points, including a clutch four-point play, and the Bulls rallied to beat the Toronto Raptors 125-115 in overtime on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
